node_8.subject: Arthur Burton
node_8.description: This is Arthur Burton's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, Wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, Go for a morning walk to stay active and clear his mind from 8:30 am to 9:00 am, Spend some time reading about mixology and cocktail recipes from 9:00 am to 10:30 am, Visit the local market for fresh ingredients and unique garnishes for cocktail experimentation from 10:30 am to 12:00 pm, Prepare and try out a new cocktail recipe from 12:00 pm to 1:30 pm, taking notes on flavors and presentation, Have lunch around 1:30 pm, possibly at a nearby café or at home, Spend some time in the afternoon planning for a special event at the pub or brainstorming promotional ideas from 2:00 pm to 3:30 pm, Take a short break to relax, listen to music, or play a casual game from 3:30 pm to 4:00 pm.
